MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-09-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-09-2015 IN 206, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT WILL HOLD OFF THE SIGNING OF THE JUDGMENT FOR 2 WEEKS TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO NEGOTIATE A PAYMENT PLAN WITH THE PLAINTIFF. THE TRIAL ON THIS MATTER ON MARCH 23 WILL BE TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: CYNTHIA S. HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. Per the Court's tentative ruling, as to PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Judge Goldsmith recuses himself. Per order of the Presiding Judge, the motion is transferred to be heard in department 206 before the Presiding Judge promptly at 10:15 a.m. on the same date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank National Association'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEVE MAINS OF MAINS & BLOOM, TEL. NO. 455-1847 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
VICTORIA AGUAS, TEL. NO. 297-7521, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED WITH DEFENDANT REQUESTING THE COURT FOR A CONTINUANCE ON THE MATTER IN ORDER TO HIRE COUNSEL OVER THE OBJECTION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE COURT WILL HOLD OFF THE SIGNING OF THE JUDGMENT FOR 2 WEEKS TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO NEGOTIATE A PAYMENT PLAN WITH THE PLAINTIFF. THE TRIAL ON THIS MATTER ON MARCH 23 WILL BE TAKEN OFF-CALENDAR. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: CYNTHIA S. HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
